units.content: Wikidata permits instruments as first-class items with attribute-type property-value statements in a general knowledge-graph representation
Wikidata lacks a downstream sensitivity-set-gated divergence-prediction mechanism
Wikidata is characterized as a disclosure format, not a prediction architecture
Claim 8a is distinguished from Wikidata because claim 8a is a prediction architecture with a sensitivity-set-gated divergence-prediction mechanism
